feed.subtitle: QLD Severe Weather Alerts updated regularly
feed.title: QLD Severe Weather Alert Feed

entry.content: UPDATED TEST WARNING. Conditions have changed for Brisbane CBD. This should test the updated-warning path in the polling flow.
entry.title: WATCH AND ACT - Brisbane CBD - SEVERE STORM - Updated at 1:00pm, Saturday 27 June 2026

entry.content: NEW TEST WARNING. This is a brand new warning added to test the new-warning path in the polling flow.
entry.title: EMERGENCY WARNING - Gold Coast - FLASH FLOODING - Issued at 1:00pm, Saturday 27 June 2026

entry.content: CANCELLED TEST WARNING. This entry is included to test any cancelled or resolved warning handling in the polling flow.
entry.title: CANCELLED - Testing Area - CYCLONE - Cancelled at 1:00pm, Saturday 27 June 2026
